All fixed. Here's a summary of what was found and done:

**Root cause:** Pippi's agent file (`critic.md`) had a YAML inline comment on the model field:
```yaml
model: claude  # gemini pending API key from jaboostin
```
YAML does not treat `#` after a bare unquoted value as a comment — `gray-matter` parsed the entire string `claude  # gemini pending API key from jaboostin` as the model value. This didn't match any key in `MODEL_ALIASES` and didn't start with `claude-`, so `callLlm()` hit the `Unk...(truncated)
